record.field: 'Form10_Bulk_' + ((object and object.project_id and object.project_id.name) or (docs and docs[0] and docs[0].project_id and docs[0].project_id.name) or 'All')

t.t-if: not o or not 'company_id' in o

h2.style: text-decoration: underline; margin: 0 0 5px 0; text-align: center; font-size: 28px;

td.style: width: 8%; padding: 5px; text-align: center; vertical-align: middle;
width: 8%; padding: 5px; text-align: center; vertical-align: middle;

a.style: display: block; width: 80px; height: 80px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0; text-decoration: none;

img.alt: QR Code - Click to download PDF
img.style: width: 80px; height: 80px; max-width: 80px; max-height: 80px; border: none; display: block; margin: 0; padding: 0; object-fit: contain;

a.style: display: block; width: 80px; height: 80px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0; text-decoration: none;

div.style: width: 80px; height: 80px; position: relative; border: 1px solid #ccc; background: white; margin: 0;
position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
margin-bottom: 15px; padding: 10px; text-align: left; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700;
div.strong: संलग्न :- प्रभावित भूमियों का बी-1, खसरा एवं नक्शा

t.t-value: docs if docs else (object and [object] or [])
surveys and len(surveys) > 0 and surveys[0] or (object or False)
sum(s.total_area or 0.0 for s in surveys)
sum(s.acquired_area or 0.0 for s in surveys)

th.strong: भूमि पर स्थित वृक्ष की संख्या (प्रजातिवार)
भूमि पर स्थित परिसंपत्तियों का विवरण

td.style: text-align: center; padding: 20px; color: red; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000;

tr.td:
No surveys found. Please check that surveys exist for the selected project and village.
Number of surveys:

t.t-value: sum(len((lo.name or '') + (' पिता ' + lo.father_name if lo.father_name else (' पति ' + lo.spouse_name if lo.spouse_name else ''))) for lo in s.landowner_ids) if s.landowner_ids else 0
max([len((lo.name or '') + (' पिता ' + lo.father_name if lo.father_name else (' पति ' + lo.spouse_name if lo.spouse_name else ''))) for lo in s.landowner_ids] or [0])
1 if lo_max_name_chars > 40 else (3 if (lo_count > 20 or lo_total_chars > 420) else (4 if (lo_count > 12 or lo_total_chars > 260) else 5))

tr.t-att-class: 'survey-row ' + form10_parity + (' form10-row-fresh' if needs_fresh_page else '') + (' form10-grouped-row' if lo_count > 5 else '')

td.t-attf-class: form10-name-cell #{'form10-lo-many' if is_lo_many else ''} #{'form10-lo-xl' if is_lo_xl else ''} #{'form10-lo-xxl' if is_lo_xxl else ''}
form10-name-cell #{'form10-lo-many' if is_lo_many else ''} #{'form10-lo-xl' if is_lo_xl else ''} #{'form10-lo-xxl' if is_lo_xxl else ''}

t.t-if: counter > chunk_idx * lo_chunk_size and counter <= (chunk_idx + 1) * lo_chunk_size

record.field: 'Form10_Bulk_Landscape_' + ((object and object.project_id and object.project_id.name) or (docs and docs[0] and docs[0].project_id and docs[0].project_id.name) or 'All')

t.t-value: docs if docs else (object and [object] or [])
surveys and len(surveys) > 0 and surveys[0] or (object or False)
sum(s.total_area or 0.0 for s in surveys)
sum(s.acquired_area or 0.0 for s in surveys)

th.strong: भूमि पर स्थित वृक्ष की संख्या (प्रजातिवार)
भूमि पर स्थित परिसंपत्तियों का विवरण

td.style: text-align: center; padding: 20px; color: red; font-weight: bold;

tr.td:
No surveys found. Please check that surveys exist for the selected project and village.
Number of surveys:

t.t-value: sum(len((lo.name or '') + (' पिता ' + lo.father_name if lo.father_name else (' पति ' + lo.spouse_name if lo.spouse_name else ''))) for lo in s.landowner_ids) if s.landowner_ids else 0
max([len((lo.name or '') + (' पिता ' + lo.father_name if lo.father_name else (' पति ' + lo.spouse_name if lo.spouse_name else ''))) for lo in s.landowner_ids] or [0])
1 if lo_max_name_chars > 40 else (3 if (lo_count > 20 or lo_total_chars > 420) else (4 if (lo_count > 12 or lo_total_chars > 260) else 5))

tr.t-att-class: 'survey-row ' + form10_parity + (' form10-row-fresh' if needs_fresh_page else '') + (' form10-grouped-row' if lo_count > 5 else '')

td.t-attf-class: form10-name-cell #{'form10-lo-many' if is_lo_many else ''} #{'form10-lo-xl' if is_lo_xl else ''} #{'form10-lo-xxl' if is_lo_xxl else ''}
form10-name-cell #{'form10-lo-many' if is_lo_many else ''} #{'form10-lo-xl' if is_lo_xl else ''} #{'form10-lo-xxl' if is_lo_xxl else ''}

t.t-if: counter > chunk_idx * lo_chunk_size and counter <= (chunk_idx + 1) * lo_chunk_size
